summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Family Fans Mony platform with 7 new feature groups. All major functionality working correctly including referral system, admin dashboard enhancements, creator level-up requests, profile photo upload, admin wallet with commission tracking, and custom ranking boards.
passed_tests: Homepage loads without Emergent branding
Register page has 'Codigo de Referido' optional field
Admin login works with provided credentials (edrianttrejol@gmail.com / Sportox@22)
Admin dashboard redirect to /admin with all sidebar links visible
Admin sidebar shows Niveles, Billetera, Tableros Ranking links
Admin Billetera page shows commission total ($1.06)
Admin Tableros Ranking page allows creating new boards
Admin Users page shows level dropdown for creators
Creator dashboard shows 'Subir de Nivel' button
Creator dashboard shows 'Foto de Perfil' button
Creator dashboard shows Programa de Referidos section with referral code
Creator can access Curador tab with Spotify functionality
Fan dashboard loads correctly
Fan dashboard has 'Escuchar y Ganar' tab with micro-tasks
Backend API /api/referrals returns referral info correctly
Backend API /api/admin/wallet returns commission data
All 15 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
User registration with referral code support
Authentication and authorization working properly
Commission tracking and referral system functional
